tasks.subject: Task 0: Vast adapter compat shim
tasks.description:
**Goal:** apply_vast_sdk_compat() makes sky's vast.vast().client.api_key resolve against vastai-sdk 0.2.5, idempotently and only when needed.

**Files:** src/kinoforge/providers/skypilot/vast_compat.py (new), src/kinoforge/providers/skypilot/__init__.py (call at import), tests/providers/test_skypilot_vast_compat.py.

**Verify:** `pixi run -e live-skypilot pytest tests/providers/test_skypilot_vast_compat.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/providers/skypilot/vast_compat.py", "src/kinoforge/providers/skypilot/__init__.py", "tests/providers/test_skypilot_vast_compat.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run -e live-skypilot pytest tests/providers/test_skypilot_vast_compat.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["VastAI().client.api_key resolves after shim", "idempotent (2nd call False)", "no raise when sdk absent/already-correct"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Tunnel seams + create_instance HTTP endpoint
tasks.description:
**Goal:** SkyPilotProvider.__init__ gains injectable ssh_spawn/port_allocator seams + _tunnels map; create_instance opens ssh -L tunnel and returns endpoints={"8000": "http://127.0.0.1:<port>"} for a server spec.

**Files:** src/kinoforge/providers/skypilot/__init__.py (__init__, create_instance, _alloc_free_port/_spawn_ssh_tunnel, import ProvisionFailed/socket/subprocess), tests/providers/test_skypilot_tunnel.py (new).

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_skypilot_tunnel.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/providers/skypilot/__init__.py", "tests/providers/test_skypilot_tunnel.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_skypilot_tunnel.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["server spec yields http://127.0.0.1 endpoint", "ssh_spawn called (cluster,port,8000) + stored in _tunnels", "no run_cmd -> no tunnel/empty endpoints", "spawn failure -> ProvisionFailed + sky.down"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: destroy_instance tunnel teardown
tasks.description:
**Goal:** destroy_instance kills the tunnel subprocess (in a finally, even if sky down raises) and drops it from _tunnels.

**Files:** src/kinoforge/providers/skypilot/__init__.py (destroy_instance, _kill_tunnel), tests/providers/test_skypilot_tunnel.py (extend).

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_skypilot_tunnel.py -k destroy -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/providers/skypilot/__init__.py", "tests/providers/test_skypilot_tunnel.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_skypilot_tunnel.py -k destroy -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["destroy kills tunnel + drops from _tunnels", "tunnel killed even if sky.down raises", "tunnel-less destroy no raise"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Provisioning characterization guard
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Lock that create_instance builds a sky Task carrying provision_script->setup and run_cmd->run so the server starts on the node (Component C).

**Files:** tests/providers/test_skypilot_tunnel.py (extend — reuses Task-1 fakes).

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_skypilot_tunnel.py -k task_carries -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/providers/test_skypilot_tunnel.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_skypilot_tunnel.py -k task_carries -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["setup == stripped provision_script", "run == shlex-joined run_cmd", "accelerators from offer.gpu_type"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Live-proof example config
tasks.description:
**Goal:** examples/configs/skypilot-vast-flashvsr.yaml — provider=skypilot, cloud=[vast], upscale-only FlashVSR cfg that loads + passes validation.

**Files:** examples/configs/skypilot-vast-flashvsr.yaml (new), tests/core/test_config.py (extend).

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_config.py -k skypilot_vast_flashvsr -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/configs/skypilot-vast-flashvsr.yaml", "tests/core/test_config.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_config.py -k skypilot_vast_flashvsr -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["provider skypilot + cloud [vast]", "upscale_only true + upscale.engine flashvsr", "passes cloud-pin validation"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Live proof — one video on vast.ai via SkyPilot (USER-GATE)
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Requested by the user in-conversation; MUST NOT be closed by walking around it or substituting a cheaper check. Close only after every acceptanceCriteria item is independently re-validated with captured output.

**Goal:** Provision a vast.ai GPU via SkyPilot, upscale the fixture over the SSH tunnel, frame-QA, confirm clean teardown — proving the HTTP-over-sky chain end to end.

**Files:** tests/live/test_skypilot_vast_flashvsr_live.py (RED scaffold committed BEFORE spend), successful-generations.md (entry after green).

**Verify:** VAST_API_KEY present -> `pixi run preflight` exit 0 -> upscale cmd -> frame-QA -> `pixi run kinoforge list` fully clean.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/live/test_skypilot_vast_flashvsr_live.py", "successful-generations.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run preflight && pixi run -e live-skypilot kinoforge upscale --config examples/configs/skypilot-vast-flashvsr.yaml --video output/20260630-221857_..._Photorealistic-cinem.mp4 --no-reuse", "acceptanceCriteria": ["upscale exits 0 + writes mp4", "ffprobe shows real 1080-height video", "frame-QA high-quality verdict recorded", "GPU utilisation observed non-zero during run", "kinoforge list clean after (no pod, no ledger entry)", "successful-generations.md entry added"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "single", "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Full suite + lint/type green, update PROGRESS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Whole suite green, lint/type clean, PROGRESS records the SkyPilot-vast video-gen capability (slice 1 shipped).

**Files:** PROGRESS.md.

**Verify:** `pixi run pre-commit run --all-files`; `pixi run test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["PROGRESS.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pre-commit run --all-files", "acceptanceCriteria": ["full offline suite green", "vast_compat green in live-skypilot env", "lint+typecheck clean", "pre-commit passes", "PROGRESS updated"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```
